endpoints.name: GET /applications
endpoints.description: Lists all of the applications available in the specified account.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /applications/{applicationId}
endpoints.description: Gets information about the specified application.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{APPLICATIONID}} with a real applicationid.

endpoints.name: GET /certificates
endpoints.description: Lists all of the certificates that have been added to the specified account.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: POST /certificates
endpoints.description: Adds a certificate to the specified account.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /certificates(thumbprintAlgorithm={thumbprintAlgorithm},thumbprint={thumbprint})
endpoints.description: Gets information about the specified certificate.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{THUMBPRINT}} with a real thumbprint. Replace {{THUMBPRINTALGORITHM}} with a real thumbprintalgorithm.

endpoints.name: DELETE /certificates(thumbprintAlgorithm={thumbprintAlgorithm},thumbprint={thumbprint})
endpoints.description: Deletes a certificate from the specified account.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{THUMBPRINT}} with a real thumbprint. Replace {{THUMBPRINTALGORITHM}} with a real thumbprintalgorithm.

endpoints.name: POST /certificates(thumbprintAlgorithm={thumbprintAlgorithm},thumbprint={thumbprint})/canceldelete
endpoints.description: Cancels a failed deletion of a certificate from the specified account.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{THUMBPRINT}} with a real thumbprint. Replace {{THUMBPRINTALGORITHM}} with a real thumbprintalgorithm.

endpoints.name: GET /jobs
endpoints.description: Lists all of the jobs in the specified account.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: POST /jobs
endpoints.description: Adds a job to the specified account.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /jobs/{jobId}
endpoints.description: Gets information about the specified job.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{JOBID}} with a real jobid.

endpoints.name: PUT /jobs/{jobId}
endpoints.description: Updates the properties of a job.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{JOBID}} with a real jobid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /jobs/{jobId}
endpoints.description: Deletes a job.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{JOBID}} with a real jobid.

endpoints.name: PATCH /jobs/{jobId}
endpoints.description: Updates the properties of a job.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{JOBID}} with a real jobid.

endpoints.name: POST /jobs/{jobId}/disable
endpoints.description: Disables the specified job, preventing new tasks from running.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{JOBID}} with a real jobid.

endpoints.name: POST /jobs/{jobId}/enable
endpoints.description: Enables the specified job, allowing new tasks to run.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{JOBID}} with a real jobid.

endpoints.name: GET /jobs/{jobId}/tasks
endpoints.description: Lists all of the tasks that are associated with the specified job.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{JOBID}} with a real jobid.

endpoints.name: POST /jobs/{jobId}/tasks
endpoints.description: Adds a task to the specified job.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{JOBID}} with a real jobid.

endpoints.name: GET /jobs/{jobId}/tasks/{taskId}
endpoints.description: Gets information about the specified task.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{TASKID}} with a real taskid. Replace {{JOBID}} with a real jobid.

endpoints.name: PUT /jobs/{jobId}/tasks/{taskId}
endpoints.description: Updates the properties of the specified task.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{TASKID}} with a real taskid. Replace {{JOBID}} with a real jobid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /jobs/{jobId}/tasks/{taskId}
endpoints.description: Deletes a task from the specified job.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{TASKID}} with a real taskid. Replace {{JOBID}} with a real jobid.

endpoints.name: GET /jobs/{jobId}/tasks/{taskId}/files
endpoints.description: Lists the files in a task's directory on its compute node.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{TASKID}} with a real taskid. Replace {{JOBID}} with a real jobid.

endpoints.name: GET /jobs/{jobId}/tasks/{taskId}/files/{fileName}
endpoints.description: Gets the content of the specified task file.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{TASKID}} with a real taskid. Replace {{JOBID}} with a real jobid. Replace {{FILENAME}} with a real filename.

endpoints.name: DELETE /jobs/{jobId}/tasks/{taskId}/files/{fileName}
endpoints.description: Deletes the specified task file from the compute node where the task ran.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{TASKID}} with a real taskid. Replace {{JOBID}} with a real jobid. Replace {{FILENAME}} with a real filename.

endpoints.name: HEAD /jobs/{jobId}/tasks/{taskId}/files/{fileName}
endpoints.description: Gets the properties of the specified task file.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{TASKID}} with a real taskid. Replace {{JOBID}} with a real jobid. Replace {{FILENAME}} with a real filename.

endpoints.name: GET /jobs/{jobId}/tasks/{taskId}/subtasksinfo
endpoints.description: Lists all of the subtasks that are associated with the specified multi-instance task.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{TASKID}} with a real taskid. Replace {{JOBID}} with a real jobid.

endpoints.name: POST /jobs/{jobId}/tasks/{taskId}/terminate
endpoints.description: Terminates the specified task.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{TASKID}} with a real taskid. Replace {{JOBID}} with a real jobid.

endpoints.name: POST /jobs/{jobId}/terminate
endpoints.description: Terminates the specified job, marking it as completed.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{JOBID}} with a real jobid.

endpoints.name: GET /jobschedules
endpoints.description: Lists all of the job schedules in the specified account.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: POST /jobschedules
endpoints.description: Adds a job schedule to the specified account.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /jobschedules/{jobScheduleId}
endpoints.description: Gets information about the specified job schedule.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{JOBSCHEDULEID}} with a real jobscheduleid.

endpoints.name: PUT /jobschedules/{jobScheduleId}
endpoints.description: Updates the properties of the specified job schedule.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{JOBSCHEDULEID}} with a real jobscheduleid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /jobschedules/{jobScheduleId}
endpoints.description: Deletes a job schedule from the specified account.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{JOBSCHEDULEID}} with a real jobscheduleid.

endpoints.name: PATCH /jobschedules/{jobScheduleId}
endpoints.description: Updates the properties of the specified job schedule.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{JOBSCHEDULEID}} with a real jobscheduleid.

endpoints.name: HEAD /jobschedules/{jobScheduleId}
endpoints.description: Checks the specified job schedule exists.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{JOBSCHEDULEID}} with a real jobscheduleid.

endpoints.name: POST /jobschedules/{jobScheduleId}/disable
endpoints.description: Disables a job schedule.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{JOBSCHEDULEID}} with a real jobscheduleid.

endpoints.name: POST /jobschedules/{jobScheduleId}/enable
endpoints.description: Enables a job schedule.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{JOBSCHEDULEID}} with a real jobscheduleid.

endpoints.name: GET /jobschedules/{jobScheduleId}/jobs
endpoints.description: Lists the jobs that have been created under the specified job schedule.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{JOBSCHEDULEID}} with a real jobscheduleid.

endpoints.name: POST /jobschedules/{jobScheduleId}/terminate
endpoints.description: Terminates a job schedule.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{JOBSCHEDULEID}} with a real jobscheduleid.

endpoints.name: GET /lifetimejobstats
endpoints.description: Gets lifetime summary statistics for all of the jobs in the specified account. Statistics are aggregated across all jobs that have ever existed in the account, from account creation to the last update time of the statistics.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /lifetimepoolstats
endpoints.description: Gets lifetime summary statistics for all of the pools in the specified account. Statistics are aggregated across all pools that have ever existed in the account, from account creation to the last update time of the statistics.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /pools
endpoints.description: Lists all of the pools in the specified account.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: POST /pools
endpoints.description: Adds a pool to the specified account.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /pools/{poolId}
endpoints.description: Gets information about the specified pool.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{POOLID}} with a real poolid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /pools/{poolId}
endpoints.description: Deletes a pool from the specified account.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{POOLID}} with a real poolid.

endpoints.name: PATCH /pools/{poolId}
endpoints.description: Updates the properties of a pool.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{POOLID}} with a real poolid.

endpoints.name: HEAD /pools/{poolId}
endpoints.description: Gets basic properties of a pool.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{POOLID}} with a real poolid.

endpoints.name: POST /pools/{poolId}/disableautoscale
endpoints.description: Disables automatic scaling for a pool.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{POOLID}} with a real poolid.

endpoints.name: POST /pools/{poolId}/enableautoscale
endpoints.description: Enables automatic scaling for a pool.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{POOLID}} with a real poolid.

endpoints.name: POST /pools/{poolId}/evaluateautoscale
endpoints.description: Gets the result of evaluating an automatic scaling formula on the pool.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{POOLID}} with a real poolid.

endpoints.name: GET /pools/{poolId}/nodes
endpoints.description: Lists the compute nodes in the specified pool.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{POOLID}} with a real poolid.

endpoints.name: GET /pools/{poolId}/nodes/{nodeId}
endpoints.description: Gets information about the specified compute node.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NODEID}} with a real nodeid. Replace {{POOLID}} with a real poolid.

endpoints.name: POST /pools/{poolId}/nodes/{nodeId}/disablescheduling
endpoints.description: Disable task scheduling of the specified compute node.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NODEID}} with a real nodeid. Replace {{POOLID}} with a real poolid.

endpoints.name: POST /pools/{poolId}/nodes/{nodeId}/enablescheduling
endpoints.description: Enable task scheduling of the specified compute node.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NODEID}} with a real nodeid. Replace {{POOLID}} with a real poolid.

endpoints.name: GET /pools/{poolId}/nodes/{nodeId}/files
endpoints.description: Lists all of the files in task directories on the specified compute node.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NODEID}} with a real nodeid. Replace {{POOLID}} with a real poolid.

endpoints.name: GET /pools/{poolId}/nodes/{nodeId}/files/{fileName}
endpoints.description: Gets the content of the specified task file.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NODEID}} with a real nodeid. Replace {{POOLID}} with a real poolid. Replace {{FILENAME}} with a real filename.

endpoints.name: DELETE /pools/{poolId}/nodes/{nodeId}/files/{fileName}
endpoints.description: Deletes the specified task file from the compute node.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NODEID}} with a real nodeid. Replace {{POOLID}} with a real poolid. Replace {{FILENAME}} with a real filename.

endpoints.name: HEAD /pools/{poolId}/nodes/{nodeId}/files/{fileName}
endpoints.description: Gets the properties of the specified compute node file.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NODEID}} with a real nodeid. Replace {{POOLID}} with a real poolid. Replace {{FILENAME}} with a real filename.

endpoints.name: GET /pools/{poolId}/nodes/{nodeId}/rdp
endpoints.description: Gets the Remote Desktop Protocol file for the specified compute node.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NODEID}} with a real nodeid. Replace {{POOLID}} with a real poolid.

endpoints.name: POST /pools/{poolId}/nodes/{nodeId}/reboot
endpoints.description: Restarts the specified compute node.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NODEID}} with a real nodeid. Replace {{POOLID}} with a real poolid.

endpoints.name: POST /pools/{poolId}/nodes/{nodeId}/reimage
endpoints.description: Reinstalls the operating system on the specified compute node.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NODEID}} with a real nodeid. Replace {{POOLID}} with a real poolid.

endpoints.name: POST /pools/{poolId}/nodes/{nodeId}/users
endpoints.description: Adds a user account to the specified compute node.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NODEID}} with a real nodeid. Replace {{POOLID}} with a real poolid.

endpoints.name: PUT /pools/{poolId}/nodes/{nodeId}/users/{userName}
endpoints.description: Updates the password or expiration time of a user account on the specified compute node.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NODEID}} with a real nodeid. Replace {{POOLID}} with a real poolid. Replace {{USERNAME}} with a real username.

endpoints.name: DELETE /pools/{poolId}/nodes/{nodeId}/users/{userName}
endpoints.description: Deletes a user account from the specified compute node.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NODEID}} with a real nodeid. Replace {{POOLID}} with a real poolid. Replace {{USERNAME}} with a real username.

endpoints.name: POST /pools/{poolId}/removenodes
endpoints.description: Removes compute nodes from the specified pool.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{POOLID}} with a real poolid.

endpoints.name: POST /pools/{poolId}/resize
endpoints.description: Changes the number of compute nodes that are assigned to a pool.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{POOLID}} with a real poolid.

endpoints.name: POST /pools/{poolId}/stopresize
endpoints.description: Stops an ongoing resize operation on the pool. This does not restore the pool to its previous state before the resize operation: it only stops any further changes being made, and the pool maintains its current state.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{POOLID}} with a real poolid.

endpoints.name: POST /pools/{poolId}/updateproperties
endpoints.description: Updates the properties of a pool.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{POOLID}} with a real poolid.

endpoints.name: POST /pools/{poolId}/upgradeos
endpoints.description: Upgrades the operating system of the specified pool.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{POOLID}} with a real poolid.

endpoints.name: GET /poolusagemetrics
endpoints.description: Lists the usage metrics, aggregated by pool across individual time intervals, for the specified account.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.
